hero.label: Latin American CTF Team
hero.tagline: We hunt together, learn together, and conquer challenges as a united front.
hero.subtitle: From web exploitation to reverse engineering — every flag has a hunter.

about.label: Who We Are
about.title: The Pack Hunts as One
about.description: Cazabanderas — Flag Hunters — is an elite competitive CTF team rooted in Latin America and competing on the world stage. We were forged from a shared passion for cybersecurity, ethical hacking, and the thrill of the hunt.
about.description2: Whether you're a seasoned hunter with years of experience or just starting your journey into ethical hacking, our pack thrives on collaboration, knowledge sharing, and the relentless pursuit of flags. Every skill — from web exploitation to reverse engineering, binary exploitation to cryptography — has its place in our arsenal.

values.ethicalHackingDesc: We operate strictly within legal and ethical boundaries, using our skills to learn, compete, and contribute to a safer digital world.
values.packMentalityDesc: No hunter is left behind. We share knowledge, mentor newcomers, and tackle every challenge as a unified front.
values.relentlessPursuitDesc: Every flag is a lesson. We approach each challenge with determination, creativity, and methodical precision.
values.latinRootsDesc: Born in Latin America, competing worldwide. We carry our culture and identity into every competition we enter.

arsenal.label: Our Arsenal
arsenal.title: Our Arsenal
arsenal.subtitle: Every category is a weapon. We sharpen them all.

categories.osintDesc: Open-source intelligence gathering, social engineering research, and digital footprint analysis.
categories.mobileDesc: iOS and Android exploitation, reverse engineering mobile apps, and mobile security assessments.
categories.webDesc: SQL injection, XSS, SSRF, IDOR, deserialization, and every vulnerability hiding in web applications.
categories.gamePwnDesc: Game hacking, memory manipulation, cheat engine exploitation, and game engine vulnerabilities.
categories.reversingDesc: Static and dynamic analysis, VM deobfuscation, firmware reversing, and anti-debug bypass.
categories.aiMlDesc: Machine learning model attacks, adversarial examples, neural network exploitation.
categories.cryptoDesc: RSA, ECC, AES, lattice attacks, hash collisions, and custom cipher analysis.
categories.hardwareDesc: Hardware hacking, side-channel attacks, fault injection, and embedded system exploitation.
categories.codingDesc: Algorithm challenges, programming puzzles, and code analysis for CTF competitions.
categories.forensicsDesc: Memory dumps, disk images, network captures, and artifact recovery from compromised systems.
categories.blockchainDesc: Smart contract exploitation, blockchain security, and cryptocurrency vulnerability analysis.

writeups.label: Knowledge Base
writeups.title: Write-ups & Walkthroughs
writeups.subtitle: We share our knowledge. Every solved challenge is a lesson for the whole pack.
writeups.search: Search by title, tags, or category...
writeups.tryAdjusting: Try adjusting your filters or search terms.

join.label: Recruitment
join.title: Join the Hunt
join.subtitle: Are you ready to hunt flags with one of Latin America's most driven CTF teams? We're always looking for passionate, skilled, and collaborative hunters to join our pack.
lookFor: Passion for cybersecurity and ethical hacking
Willingness to learn and share knowledge
Proficiency in at least one CTF category
Collaborative mindset — the pack hunts together
Basic English or Spanish communication skills

form.title: Application Form
form.subtitle: Operative Request Form-001
form.about: Tell us about yourself, your experience, and what you bring to the pack...
